title: Projected Volumes — Example configuration with a secret, a downwardAPI, and a configMap
text:
apiVersion
:
v1
kind
:
Pod
metadata
:
name
:
volume-test
spec
:
containers
:
-
name
:
container-test
image
:
busybox:1.28
command
:
[
"sleep"
,
"3600"
]
volumeMounts
:
-
name
:
all-in-one
mountPath
:
"/projected-volume"
readOnly
:
true
volumes
:
-
name
:
all-in-one
projected
:
sources
:
-
secret
:
name
:
mysecret
items
:
-
key
:
username
path
:
my-group/my-username
-
downwardAPI
:
items
:
-
path
:
"labels"
fieldRef
:
fieldPath
:
metadata.labels
-
path
:
"cpu_limit"
resourceFieldRef
:
containerName
:
container-test
resource
:
limits.cpu
-
configMap
:
name
:
myconfigmap
items
:
-
key
:
config
path
:
my-group/my-config
